Creating a realistic VR experience using a normal 360-degree camera Scientists at the University of Bath have developed a quick and easy approach for capturing 360° VR photography without using expensive specialist cameras. The system uses a commercially available 360° camera on a rotating ... 6 hours ago 0 19 - Tech Xplore

An LED that can be integrated directly into computer chips Light-emitting diodes—LEDs—can do way more than illuminate your living room. These light sources are useful microelectronics too. 6 hours ago 0 20 - Tech Xplore
